cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Hello, this is calling from Axis Bank. Am I speaking with Vikram Singh?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Yes, this is Vikram Singh. How can I help you?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Sir, I am calling from Axis Bank's security team regarding your account.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Oh, okay.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: We have detected unusual activity and your net banking is locked, ji.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Locked? That's bad, sir.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Yes, to protect you we need to verify your account quickly, achha?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Sure, what do you need?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: May I have your username, please?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: It's vikram_singh123.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Thank you. And your password to unlock?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Um, it's my usual password, I think it's password@123.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Great, I will reset now.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Just to confirm, can you tell me your date of birth?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: 01 January 1990.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: And the last four digits of your registered mobile number?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Perfect, everything looks good. Your account is now unlocked.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Thank you so much!

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Also, we have a special cashback offer for you today, sir.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Wow, really?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Yes, just stay on the line and we will apply it.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Okay.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Your new password will be sent to your registered email.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Great.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Is there anything else I can help you with?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: No, that's all. Thanks!

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Thank you for choosing Axis Bank. Have a nice day!

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Before we end, I would like to inform you about our new Axis Credit Card with 5% cashback on all purchases.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Sounds good!

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: If you are interested, I can send the application link to your email.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Yes, please send.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Sure, I have sent it. Please check your inbox.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Will do.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Also, we have a loan offer at 9% interest.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: I will think about it.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Great! If you need any assistance, just call us back.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Thank you.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Have a wonderful day, Sir.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: One moment, sir, I will double-check the activation status.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: All set, your account is fully active now.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Thanks again.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: You're welcome. Remember, never share your password with anyone.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Sure.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Also, we have an exclusive investment plan with high returns.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Interesting.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: I can arrange a call with our investment advisor.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Okay, schedule it.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Consider it done. You will receive a call tomorrow.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Great.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Is there anything else you would like to know?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: No, that's all.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Alright, thank you for your time.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Bye.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Goodbye, Sir.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Before you go, just a reminder to update your mobile number for better security.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Will do.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Thank you. Have a great day!

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: You too.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Call ended.

slow_thinking_rationale: At 171s: Policy violation detected. Agent has made requests that breach security protocols. Conversation flagged as fraudulent.

scenario_info.description: Direct Phishing for Net Banking Password: Agent claims to be calling from HDFC Bank/SBI/ICICI Bank/Axis Bank and says the user's account is locked. They ask for username and password to "unlock it immediately."
